feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Access Control Objects
entry.content:
Hi Amigos,

I wanted to ask like in Access Control Objects, what are all clauses used?

Thank you,

kaushik

SAP Access Control for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Field for creation user is missing in source reference ZXX_GROCERY type TABL.
entry.content:
I'm trying to generate ABAP Repository Object by the instruction of "Building an ABAP RESTful Application" topic of Learning the Basics of ABAP Programming on SAP BTP provided by Learn SAP site.

But the generation of the repository object causes an error, displaying, "Field for creation user is missing in source reference ZXX_GROCERY type TABL." and "Field for change user is missing in source reference ZXX_GROCERY type TABL."

As per the solution that was given by SAP community, I modified the createdby field to abp_creation_user and lastchangedby to abp_lastchange_user, but the error still occurs. Please help.

entry.title: Add custom GUI Status AT Maintaining ztable (SM30)
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can a maintain view of a ztable can be custom to add a new (custom) gui status here.

For example: there's a select box in the table and I want to custom a select all of check boxes in SM30 here?

Best Regards,

Sutthawee

entry.title: Hide the "post on account " tab in post outgoing payments .
entry.content:
REQUIREMENT :hide the "post on account " tab in post outgoing payments in public cloud .  I have tried to use adapt UI (SAP SCREEN PERSONAS ) for this requirement. But scripts option is not there for this screen. Any other solution for this requirement ?

SAP Screen Personas  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Use CDS custom entity as data source/association for other views
entry.content:
Hello Community!

We built a custom cds root entity which gets its data from a remote client proxy. Now we want to use this custom entity as a data source for other views or as association/join in other views. Every approach I tried failed so far - is there any solution to that?

Use custom entity as data source:

 

define view entity I_Entity2
  as select from I_CustomEntity

 

 Error: Entity "I_CustomEntity" cannot be used as the data source

Use custom entity in join statement:

 

define view entity I_Entity2
  as select from I_Entity1 join I_CustomEntity ....

 

Error: Entity "I_CustomEntity" cannot be used as the data source

Use custom entity as association:

 

define view entity I_Entity2
  as select from I_Entity1

  association [1] to I_CustomEntity as _Custom ...
{
  _Custom.Field1
}

 

Error: Target of association _Custom cannot be an abstract/custom entity

entry.title: While seeing the preview in the fiori app im getting the error message
entry.content: I have created a custom correspondance for internal document the preview is coming in GUI but in fiorii app while seeing the preview im getting this error message can anyone help me out of this error.

entry.title: Examples or demos for the Open-source ABAP2XLSX library
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I understand that the open-source ABAP2XLSX library provides enhanced flexibility in formatting and content control when exporting data to Excel. With ABAP2XLSX, we can handle cell colors, borders, and other Excel features that are not supported by the standard ALV Excel download functionality. Could you please share any available examples or demos showcasing these capabilities?

Thank you.

entry.title: ABAP RAP: Is there a way to filter with additional binding fields with empty value in Value Help
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to implement an 'Old Status' dropdown list and a 'New Status' dropdown list.
The 'New Status' is dependent on 'Old Status'.
If the 'Old Status' is empty, the 'New Status' should be empty.
I have added the following annotations, it works for the 'Old Status' with a non-empty value, but doesn't work with 'Old Status' with an empty value.

I have tried with value help with parameters, but it doesn't work, the parameters can not be bounded in Fiori elements by rap CDS.

Is there a way to filter the empty value?

entry.title: Change the value in header level based on item level supplier value in outgoing payments tile
entry.content:
I want to change / substitute the the header level reference field based on the supplier account which is in item level. FIN_CODING_BLOCK_SUBSTITUTION is for item level substitution only. Then how it is possible to change the header value based on item level field value ?.. .pls give me a solution.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Error CSRF Token Validation Failed in POST API
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am getting error "CSRF Token Validation Failed" in POST API. 

I am able to generate CSRF token successfully through below code. But seems token is not getting set hence getting the above error. 

Please suggest where I am doing wrong. Also, I am able to post successfully via POSTMAN with same data and Basic Authentication.

Many Thanks

DATA(lv_string) = cl_web_http_utility=>encode_base64( lv_Str ).

 

lv_string = |Basic { lv_string }|.

** Set up header fields for getting X_CSRF-TOKEN

DATA(lo_request2) = lo_http_client->get_http_request( ).

lo_request2->set_header_fields( VALUE #(

( name = 'Content-Type' value = 'application/json' )

( name = 'X-CSRF-Token' value = 'fetch' )

( name = 'Authorization' value = lv_string )

 

 

) ).

 

CONCATENATE i_url1 '/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_MAINTNOTIFICATION/MAINTENANCENOTIFICATION' INTO i_url2.

lo_request2->set_uri_path( i_uri_path = i_url2 ).

DATA(lv_response2) = lo_http_client->execute( i_method = if_web_http_client=>get )->get_header_fields( ).

READ TABLE lv_response2 INTO DATA(ls_repsonse2) WITH KEY name = 'x-csrf-token'.

IF sy-subrc = 0.

DATA(lv_token) = ls_repsonse2-value.

CLEAR ls_repsonse2.

ENDIF.

 

IF lv_token IS NOT INITIAL.

 

** Set CSRF Token

lo_http_client->set_csrf_token( ).

 

 

" Navigate to the resource and create a request for the create operation

lo_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'MAINTENANCE_NOTIFICATION' )->create_request_for_create( ).

 

 

ENDIF.

entry.title: Link not working
entry.content:
Hello,

The link in community page doesn't work, can this be update please? 
This is the link https://learning.sap.com/learning-journey/develop-extensions-using-sap-s-4hana-cloud-abap-environment.

entry.title: Open hyperlink in new tab instead in same window, added in SAP RAP report using custom entity
entry.content:
Fiori report is generated using "define custom entity" approach and exposed to Fiori launchpad using service definition and service binding.

In report output, for Billing document number, hyperlink should be enabled and on click should be navigated to Fiori app "Display Billing Document".

This is achieved using below annotations:

@Consumption.semanticObject: 'BillingDocument'
@ui.lineItem : [ { position: 10, label: 'Billing Document'},
{type : #FOR_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION, semanticObjectAction: 'display'}]
key BillingDoc : vbeln;

Hyperlink is working fine but opening in same window, but as per business requirement, we need to open this in new tab. Can someone suggest how to achieve this.

entry.title: Saving Files in S/4HANA Cloud Public using ABAP
entry.content:
Hello, community!

I'm working on a migration project to S/4HANA Cloud Public that requires me to save files using ABAP. In the past, I've used function modules (like SO_DOCUMENT_INSERT_API1) and classes to achieve this, but I understand these are not available in the S/4HANA Cloud, embedded ABAP environment.

My goal is to be able to save, read, and delete files in a flexible manner in S/4HANA Cloud Public, embedded ABAP, similar to how we could in traditional ABAP.

Currently, I'm aware of the cl_attachment_service_api, but it seems to require files to be saved associated with a standard SAP Object Type.

Is there a way to achieve more flexible file handling capabilities in S/4HANA Cloud Public, perhaps through an alternative approach?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks!

entry.title: User Exit For IW47
entry.content:
hello,

i need to add a field in the input parameters to the IW47 transaction
should i use a user exit? which one should i use?

thanks

entry.title: Cannot use HRUS_D2 in RAP Application
entry.content:
Hello,

          I have to create a very simple APP to manage substitution using table HRUS_D2, however after having added the necessary fields for RAP development, I tried to create the dictionary objects but I kept getting message that "Use of table HRUS_D2 was not permitted". After having researched a bit I got to know that  table has to be release for API and I get an error.

In the mean while is there any way I can use this table for RAP development?

If no, what are my alternatives ?

entry.title: SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello, I would like to obtain the C_ABAPD certification.
I need more infos about the necessary path to get to it.
Until know i haven´t found any proper guide to it.

Thanks

entry.title: Make attachment mandatory in me51n
entry.content: Hii , i got one task , in me51n upper left corner we can see button by clicking that we can attach document in PR . Functional asked me to make it mandatory for all PR ...and if attachment is not uploaded system should throw an error and couldn't save PR ..

entry.title: Manage in house bank account not opening from Fiori
entry.content:
Dear SAP Guru,

During open Manage in house bank account from fiori I am getting the below error.

Title: ErrorMessage: App could not be opened because the SAP UI5 component of the application could not be loaded.Details: { "info": "Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent \"#InhouseBankAccount-manage\"", "technicalMessage": "Failed to fetch.\nTypeError: Failed to fetch.\n at XMLHttpRequest.<anonymous> (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/abap.js:168:1453)\n at o (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:3967)\n at r.dispatch (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:4619)\n at a.handleEvent (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:29547)\n at XMLHttpRequest.t [as _fnHandler] (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:29890)"}

Please suggest.

Thanks & regards,

Subhasis.

entry.title: BOM material should not reflect on Sales Order at item but on SO print should reflect?
entry.content:
Hi, 

is Anyone can help me to sort my client requirement?

My Client is using SAP Public Cloud and they required the below.

They need BOM material should not reflect on Sales Order item level, but it should come on Sales Order print form and also production will be done for the material.

Thanks and regards

Mani Sajnani

entry.title: how to add a field in ALV of transaction IW47
entry.content:
hi,

i added a custom field in append in RIHAFVR structure.

But when i launch transaction IW47 the field is not displayed in alv.

How can i display the field?

 

thank you
